description: Create publication-quality alignment figure of JAMM catalytic region showing residue substitutions in NPLOC4
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

# Create a final publication-quality alignment figure showing the JAMM region
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(16, 8))
ax.axis('off')

# Define the aligned sequences around the GW motif (core JAMM region)
# Aligned at GW position, showing ±15 residues
sequences = {
    'PSMD14 (MPN+ ACTIVE)':  {'aligned': 'EMVVGWYHSHPGFGCWLSGVD', 'gw_pos': 4, 'status': 'active'},
    'BRCC3 (MPN+ ACTIVE)':   {'aligned': 'MRVVGWYHSHPHITVWPSHVD', 'gw_pos': 4, 'status': 'active'},
    'PSMD7 (MPN- pseudo)':   {'aligned': 'RIVGWYHTGPKLHKNDIAINEL', 'gw_pos': 3, 'status': 'inactive'},
    'CSN6 (MPN- pseudo)':    {'aligned': 'EFLGWYTTGGPPDPSDIHVHKQ', 'gw_pos': 3, 'status': 'inactive'},
    'EIF3F (MPN- pseudo)':   {'aligned': 'LILGWYATGHDITEHSVLIHE', 'gw_pos': 3, 'status': 'inactive'},
    'NPLOC4 (MPN- TARGET)':  {'aligned': 'RKVGWIFTDLVSEDTRKGTVR', 'gw_pos': 3, 'status': 'target'},
    'Npl4-yeast (MPN-)':     {'aligned': 'FIQAWRYTGMQRFGYMYGSQP', 'gw_pos': 3, 'status': 'inactive'},
}

y_start = 0.92
y_step = 0.09
x_start = 0.15
char_width = 0.032

# Title
ax.text(0.5, 0.98, 'JAMM Catalytic Region Alignment', 
        ha='center', va='top', fontsize=16, fontweight='bold', transform=ax.transAxes)
ax.text(0.5, 0.94, 'Aligned at conserved GW motif | Active DUBs show H[ST]H zinc-binding pair', 
        ha='center', va='top', fontsize=11, style='italic', color='gray', transform=ax.transAxes)

# JAMM motif position markers (relative to GW at position 4)
# In active DUBs: GW(pos 4) Y(5) H(6) S(7) H(8) ... D(19)
jamm_positions = {6: 'H₁\n(Zn)', 7: 'S/T', 8: 'H₂\n(Zn)', 19: 'D\n(Zn)'}

for i, (name, info) in enumerate(sequences.items()):
    y = y_start - (i + 1) * y_step
    seq = info['aligned']
    status = info['status']
    
    # Protein name
    if status == 'active':
        name_color = '#27ae60'
        name_weight = 'bold'
    elif status == 'target':
        name_color = '#c0392b'
        name_weight = 'bold'
    else:
        name_color = '#7f8c8d'
        name_weight = 'normal'
    
    ax.text(x_start - 0.01, y, name, ha='right', va='center', fontsize=10,
            fontweight=name_weight, color=name_color, transform=ax.transAxes,
            family='monospace')
    
    # Sequence characters
    for j, char in enumerate(seq):
        x = x_start + j * char_width
        
        # Color based on JAMM relevance
        if status in ['active'] and j in [6, 7, 8]:  # HSH positions
            bg_color = '#27ae60'
            text_color = 'white'
            fontweight = 'bold'
        elif status in ['active'] and j == 19:  # D position
            bg_color = '#2980b9'
            text_color = 'white'
            fontweight = 'bold'
        elif status == 'target' and j in [6, 7, 8, 19]:  # Where JAMM should be in NPLOC4
            bg_color = '#e74c3c'
            text_color = 'white'
            fontweight = 'bold'
        elif j in [4, 5]:  # GW position
            bg_color = '#f39c12'
            text_color = 'white'
            fontweight = 'bold'
        else:
            bg_color = 'white'
            text_color = 'black'
            fontweight = 'normal'
        
        # Draw background box
        rect = mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((x - char_width/2, y - 0.02), char_width, 0.04,
                                        boxstyle="round,pad=0.001", 
                                        facecolor=bg_color, edgecolor='#bdc3c7',
                                        linewidth=0.5, transform=ax.transAxes)
        ax.add_patch(rect)
        
        ax.text(x, y, char, ha='center', va='center', fontsize=11,
                fontweight=fontweight, color=text_color, transform=ax.transAxes,
                family='monospace')

# Position labels on top
for j in range(21):
    x = x_start + j * char_width
    if j in [4, 5]:
        label = 'GW' if j == 4 else ''
    elif j in jamm_positions:
        label = jamm_positions[j]
    else:
        label = ''
    
    if label:
        ax.text(x, y_start + 0.01, label, ha='center', va='bottom', fontsize=8,
                fontweight='bold', color='#2c3e50', transform=ax.transAxes)

# Legend
legend_y = 0.08
legend_items = [
    ('#f39c12', 'Conserved GW motif'),
    ('#27ae60', 'JAMM catalytic residues (H, S, H) in active DUBs'),
    ('#2980b9', 'Zinc-coordinating Asp in active DUBs'),
    ('#e74c3c', 'ABSENT catalytic residues in NPLOC4 (F, T, D instead of H, S, H)'),
]

for k, (color, label) in enumerate(legend_items):
    rect = mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((0.15, legend_y - k * 0.035 - 0.01), 0.02, 0.02,
                                    boxstyle="round,pad=0.001",
                                    facecolor=color, edgecolor='#bdc3c7',
                                    transform=ax.transAxes)
    ax.add_patch(rect)
    ax.text(0.18, legend_y - k * 0.035, label, ha='left', va='center', fontsize=9,
            transform=ax.transAxes)

# Add verdict box
verdict_text = ("VERDICT: NPLOC4 lacks all JAMM catalytic residues\n"
                "H→F, S→T, H→D at zinc-binding positions\n"
                "Classification: MPN- (catalytically inactive pseudo-DUB)")
props = dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.5', facecolor='#fadbd8', edgecolor='#e74c3c', alpha=0.9)
ax.text(0.75, 0.08, verdict_text, transform=ax.transAxes, fontsize=9,
        va='center', ha='center', bbox=props, fontweight='bold')

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('jamm_alignment_final.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Final JAMM alignment figure saved")
